turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, I need help with my hvac.
Sorry to hear that — what's the brand and model of the hvac, and what's it doing?
Thanks — a Carrier 24ACC636A003 hvac. What's it doing?
There's a burning smell coming from the vents.

That's a burning smell from the vents from your Carrier 24ACC636A003 hvac — that's a safety hazard, so please stop using it right now, switch it off at the thermostat and its breaker, and step away. I won't have you keep troubleshooting an electrical fault or fire over the phone; this needs a professional. Would you like me to schedule a technician for your Carrier 24ACC636A003 hvac?
Okay, I'll turn it off right now.
Good — thanks for shutting it off; safety first. Shall I schedule a technician for your Carrier 24ACC636A003 hvac?
Done — I'll get a technician arranged for your Carrier 24ACC636A003 hvac, and they'll follow up to confirm a time.

symptoms.description: there's a burning smell coming from the vents

steps_given: Shut off power/gas to the hvac immediately.
Do not attempt further troubleshooting until a technician inspects it.
